title: evolvulus alsinoides var. sericeus
intro: Evolvulus alsinoides var. sericeus, also known as Sericeous Dwarf Morning Glory or Dwarf Blue Daisy, is a flowering plant species native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Evolvulus alsinoides var. sericeus include its ability to aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
